title: Race Control
description: Bronze-layer event log. One row per race control message. ~50–200 rows per race (average ~100). Covers flags, incidents, safety car deployments, and procedure messages.
x-notes: session_time_s is null for all 2024 races due to FastF1 v3.8.3 API change. Use `time` (HH:MM:SS) instead; join to laps via lap number for precise timing. `message` text is unstructured   use regex or fuzzy matching.

lap.description: Lap number when message triggered. Null for pre-race messages (parades, formation laps).

time.description: Message timestamp in HH:MM:SS format (session time, not wall clock). Parse as needed.

session_time_s.description: Time in seconds since session start. **Null for all 2024 races** due to FastF1 v3.8.3 DatetimeProperties API change. Use `time` column instead.

flag.description: Flag status: YELLOW, DOUBLE_YELLOW, RED, GREEN, CHECKERED. Null for non-flag messages.

message.description: Human-readable message text. Unstructured   values include 'Safety car deployed', 'Debris on track', 'Lapped car released'. Use regex or fuzzy matching.

code.description: Internal race control code. Format varies.
